files.file:
<Application x:Class="AmbientEffectsEngine.App" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"> <Application.Resources>
</Application.Resources> </Application>

<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"> <PropertyGroup> <OutputType>WinExe</OutputType> <TargetFramework>net8.0-windows</TargetFramework> <UseWPF>true</UseWPF> <UseWindowsForms>true</UseWindowsForms> <Nullable>enable</Nullable> <ImplicitUsings>enable</ImplicitUsings> <LangVersion>12.0</LangVersion> </PropertyGroup>
<ItemGroup> <AssemblyAttribute Include="System.Runtime.CompilerServices.InternalsVisibleTo"> <_Parameter1>AmbientEffectsEngine.Tests</_Parameter1> </AssemblyAttribute> </ItemGroup>
<ItemGroup> <Content Include="Assets\**" /> </ItemGroup>
<ItemGroup> <PackageReference Include="NAudio" Version="2.2.1" /> <PackageReference Include="System.Drawing.Common" Version="8.0.0" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection" Version="8.0.0" /> <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.0" /> </ItemGroup>
</Project>

<Page x:Class="AmbientEffectsEngine.Views.MonitorSetupPage" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" Title="Monitor Setup"> <Page.Resources> <!-- Converters --> <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BooleanToVisibilityConverter"/>
<!-- Inverse Boolean to Visibility Converter --> <Style x:Key="InverseVisibilityStyle" TargetType="FrameworkElement"> <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Collapsed"/> <Style.Triggers> <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsLoading}" Value="False"> <Setter Property="Visibility" Value="Visible"/> </DataTrigger> </Style.Triggers> </Style> <!-- Style for Monitor Display Boxes --> <Style x:Key="MonitorDisplayStyle" TargetType="Border"> <Setter Property="Width" Value="120"/> <Setter Property="Height" Value="80"/> <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="2"/> <Setter Property="CornerRadius" Value="5"/> <Setter Property="Margin" Value="10"/> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#F0F0F0"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#CCCCCC"/> </Style>
<!-- Style for Selected Monitor --> <Style x:Key="SelectedMonitorStyle" TargetType="Border" BasedOn="{StaticResource MonitorDisplayStyle}"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#E3F2FD"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#2196F3"/> </Style>
<!-- Style for Primary Monitor --> <Style x:Key="PrimaryMonitorStyle" TargetType="Border" BasedOn="{StaticResource MonitorDisplayStyle}"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FFF3E0"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF9800"/> </Style>
<!-- Style for Disabled Monitor --> <Style x:Key="DisabledMonitorStyle" TargetType="Border" BasedOn="{StaticResource MonitorDisplayStyle}"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FAFAFA"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#E0E0E0"/> <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.7"/> </Style> </Page.Resources>
<Grid Margin="20"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<!-- Header --> <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="Monitor Setup" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,20" />
<!-- Instructions --> <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" TextWrapping="Wrap" HorizontalAlignment="Center" MaxWidth="600" Margin="0,0,0,30"> <TextBlock.Text> Select which secondary monitors should display ambient effects. Your primary monitor (marked in orange) cannot be selected and will only be used as the source for screen capture. </TextBlock.Text> </TextBlock>
<!-- Loading Indicator --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Visibility="{Binding IsLoading, Converter={StaticResource BooleanToVisibilityConverter}}"> <ProgressBar IsIndeterminate="True" Width="200" Height="20" Margin="0,0,0,10"/> <TextBlock Text="Loading monitors..." HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel>
<!-- Monitor Display Area --> <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="2" HorizontalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto" Style="{StaticResource InverseVisibilityStyle}"> <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding Monitors}"> <ItemsControl.ItemsPanel> <ItemsPanelTemplate> <WrapPanel HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </ItemsPanelTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemsPanel> <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Border> <Border.Style> <Style TargetType="Border" BasedOn="{StaticResource MonitorDisplayStyle}"> <Style.Triggers> <!-- Primary Monitor Style --> <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Monitor.IsPrimary}" Value="True"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FFF3E0"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#FF9800"/> </DataTrigger> <!-- Selected Monitor Style --> <MultiDataTrigger> <MultiDataTrigger.Conditions> <Condition Binding="{Binding IsSelected}" Value="True"/> <Condition Binding="{Binding Monitor.IsPrimary}" Value="False"/> </MultiDataTrigger.Conditions> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#E3F2FD"/> <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#2196F3"/> </MultiDataTrigger> <!-- Disabled Primary Monitor --> <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding CanSelect}" Value="False"> <Setter Property="Opacity" Value="0.7"/> </DataTrigger> </Style.Triggers> </Style> </Border.Style>
<Grid> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<!-- Monitor Icon --> <Viewbox Grid.Row="0" Width="40" Height="30" Margin="0,5,0,0"> <Canvas Width="24" Height="18"> <!-- Monitor Screen --> <Rectangle Width="20" Height="14" Canvas.Left="2" Canvas.Top="0" Fill="#333333" Stroke="#666666" StrokeThickness="0.5"/> <!-- Monitor Stand --> <Rectangle Width="8" Height="2" Canvas.Left="8" Canvas.Top="14.5" Fill="#666666"/> <!-- Monitor Base --> <Rectangle Width="12" Height="1.5" Canvas.Left="6" Canvas.Top="16.5" Fill="#666666"/> </Canvas> </Viewbox>
<!-- Monitor Name --> <TextBlock Grid.Row="1" Text="{Binding DisplayName}" FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="5,2,5,2" TextWrapping="Wrap" TextAlignment="Center"/>
<!-- Selection Checkbox --> <CheckBox Grid.Row="2" IsChecked="{Binding IsSelected, Mode=TwoWay}" IsEnabled="{Binding CanSelect}" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,2,0,5"> <CheckBox.Content> <TextBlock FontSize="10"> <TextBlock.Style> <Style TargetType="TextBlock"> <Setter Property="Text" Value="Select"/> <Style.Triggers> <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding Monitor.IsPrimary}" Value="True"> <Setter Property="Text" Value="Primary"/> </DataTrigger> <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsSelected}" Value="True"> <Setter Property="Text" Value="Selected"/> </DataTrigger> </Style.Triggers> </Style> </TextBlock.Style> </TextBlock> </CheckBox.Content> </CheckBox> </Grid> </Border> </DataTemplate> </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate> </ItemsControl> </ScrollViewer>
<!-- Footer Information --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="3" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,20,0,0" Style="{StaticResource InverseVisibilityStyle}"> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,5"> <Border Width="15" Height="10" Background="#FFF3E0" BorderBrush="#FF9800" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <TextBlock Text="Primary Monitor (Source)" FontSize="12" Margin="0,0,20,0"/> <Border Width="15" Height="10" Background="#E3F2FD" BorderBrush="#2196F3" BorderThickness="1" Margin="0,0,5,0"/> <TextBlock Text="Selected for Effects" FontSize="12"/> </StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="Changes are saved automatically" FontSize="11" FontStyle="Italic" Foreground="#666666" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Grid> </Page>

<Window x:Class="AmbientEffectsEngine.Views.MainWindow" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml" Title="Ambient Effects Engine" Height="450" Width="800" MinWidth="600" MinHeight="300"> <Grid Margin="20"> <Grid.RowDefinitions> <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/> <RowDefinition Height="*"/> </Grid.RowDefinitions>
<!-- Header --> <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="Ambient Effects Engine" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,30" />
<!-- Settings Panel --> <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" MaxWidth="400" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
<!-- Master On/Off Toggle --> <Border Background="#F5F5F5" BorderBrush="#DDDDDD" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="5" Padding="15" Margin="0,0,0,20"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="Master Control" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,10"/> <CheckBox Name="EnabledCheckBox" Content="Enable Ambient Effects" FontSize="14" IsChecked="{Binding IsEnabled, Mode=TwoWay}" /> </StackPanel> </Border>
<!-- Effect Style Selection --> <Border Background="#F5F5F5" BorderBrush="#DDDDDD" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="5" Padding="15" Margin="0,0,0,20"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="Effect Style" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,10"/> <ComboBox Name="EffectStyleComboBox" ItemsSource="{Binding AvailableEffects}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedEffect, Mode=TwoWay}" DisplayMemberPath="Name" FontSize="14" Height="30" /> <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedEffect.Description}" FontSize="12" FontStyle="Italic" Foreground="#666666" Margin="0,5,0,0"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
<!-- Audio Sensitivity --> <Border Background="#F5F5F5" BorderBrush="#DDDDDD" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="5" Padding="15"> <StackPanel> <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,10"> <TextBlock Text="Audio Sensitivity" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold"/> <TextBlock Text="{Binding AudioSensitivity, StringFormat='{}{0:P0}'}" FontSize="14" Foreground="#666666" Margin="10,0,0,0"/> </StackPanel> <Grid> <Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/> <ColumnDefinition Width="Auto"/> </Grid.ColumnDefinitions> <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="Low" FontSize="12" Foreground="#666666" Margin="0,0,10,0"/> <Slider Name="AudioSensitivitySlider" Grid.Column="1" Minimum="0" Maximum="1" Value="{Binding AudioSensitivity, Mode=TwoWay}" TickFrequency="0.1" IsSnapToTickEnabled="True"/> <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="High" FontSize="12" Foreground="#666666" Margin="10,0,0,0"/> </Grid> </StackPanel> </Border>
<!-- Monitor Setup Button --> <Border Background="#F5F5F5" BorderBrush="#DDDDDD" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="5" Padding="15" Margin="0,0,0,20"> <StackPanel> <TextBlock Text="Monitor Configuration" FontSize="16" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,10"/> <Button Name="MonitorSetupButton" Content="Configure Monitors" FontSize="14" Height="35" Click="MonitorSetupButton_Click" Background="#2196F3" Foreground="White" BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"> <Button.Style> <Style TargetType="Button"> <Setter Property="Template"> <Setter.Value> <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button"> <Border Background="{TemplateBinding Background}" CornerRadius="3" BorderThickness="{TemplateBinding BorderThickness}"> <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/> </Border> <ControlTemplate.Triggers> <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1976D2"/> </Trigger> <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True"> <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1565C0"/> </Trigger> </ControlTemplate.Triggers> </ControlTemplate> </Setter.Value> </Setter> </Style> </Button.Style> </Button> <TextBlock Text="Select which monitors display ambient effects" FontSize="12" FontStyle="Italic" Foreground="#666666" Margin="0,5,0,0" HorizontalAlignment="Center"/> </StackPanel> </Border>
</StackPanel> </Grid> </Window>
